global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a focus on food offerings and promotional text.
global.main_message: The ad promotes food options available nearby with a special sale.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background fills the canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Two stylized food images are displayed in a rectangular frame, suggesting delicious offerings.

elements.label: Circle icons
elements.description: Three circular icons are arranged below the food images, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: The text 'Hungry? We got you' is prominently displayed in a large, friendly font.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message reads 'Fresh favorites nearby' in a clean font.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow 'SALE' badge is placed at the top right, drawing attention to a promotion.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent 'Learn more' button is centered at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Element
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Freab Oe Learn more

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the food images are centered, the main message is prominent in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
